description_long: This is a stone obelisk monument set on a rectangular base covered with green moss and scattered brown leaves. The front face features a prominent five-pointed red star with a hammer and sickle emblem at its center, suggesting Soviet or communist symbolism. Flanking the central obelisk are two square stone posts, one of which appears to have a small circular holder or urn on top. The main shaft of the obelisk rises from a trapezoidal pedestal, tapering to a pointed tip. The surface is weathered, with visible stains and discoloration, indicating age and exposure to the elements. The base is bordered by a low curb, and the monument is set on a grassy platform.
description: A weathered stone obelisk with a red Soviet star, flanked by two square posts and set on a mossy rectangular base. The monument features a pointed shaft and a trapezoidal pedestal.
description_view_0: The narrow side of the obelisk is visible, showing the rectangular base and the shaft rising from the center.
description_view_1: The front view displays the red star with a hammer and sickle, two square posts, and the main shaft of the obelisk.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow side mirrors view 0, with the shaft and base visible but no star or ornamentation.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the plain back of the obelisk and base, with no visible inscriptions or decorations.
attribute_inscription: There is an inscription on the front face below the red star, but the text is not fully legible in the images. It appears to be engraved in a sans-serif style, possibly in Cyrillic script.
attribute_ornamentation: A prominent red five-pointed star with a hammer and sickle emblem is mounted on the front face. No other decorative carvings or motifs are visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is a rectangular stone platform with a mossy, weathered surface and a low curb. Two square stone posts are positioned at each end, one featuring a small circular urn or holder.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is sharply pointed and unadorned, with a simple, clean finish.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is set on a grassy platform with scattered brown leaves. No additional surrounding features such as fences or statues are visible.
